data.title: Survey by AlphaStruxure, Schneider Electric, and Endeavor BI reveals US Food & Beverage/CPG sectors dealing with rising energy costs amid grid constraints.
data.description: In Boston on December 4, 2025, a recent survey by AlphaStruxure, Schneider Electric, and Endeavor Business Intelligence highlights the energy challenges faced by the U.S. Food & Beverage and Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) industries. The report shows that these sectors are experiencing significant issues due to grid congestion and increasing energy costs. This joint analysis indicates that companies in these sectors are grappling with a 20% rise in energy consumption and a 15% spike in operational costs. This poses a unique challenge for businesses in these industries as they strive to navigate and address these escalating energy-related obstacles.

data.title: Unisys invites engineering students to its 17th Innovation Program with focus on AI, quantum computing, IoT.
data.description: In Bengaluru, India and Blue Bell, Pennsylvania, a recent announcement stated that engineering students are being encouraged to explore innovative technologies like artificial intelligence (AI), quantum computing, and the internet of things (IoT). As of December 4, 2025, Unisys, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol UIS, has commenced registrations for its seventeenth program aimed at empowering students in this field. This initiative aims to provide students with the necessary tools and resources to create and experiment with cutting-edge technologies, fostering a culture of creativity and forward-thinking in the engineering community.

data.title: InsightRX's AI precision dosing software deployed in 1,000+ hospitals, largest expansion of clinical decision support.
data.description: InsightRX revealed today that their AI precision dosing software has been rolled out in over 1,000 hospitals in a significant milestone for clinical decision support. This development represents the most extensive expansion of its kind, showcasing the company's ten years of progress in advancing clinical pharmacology.

data.title: YZi Labs-backed prediction market "Opinion" captures 40% share, records $1.5B weekly volume post-launch, surpassing Kalshi and Polymarket.
data.description: After recently launching, the "Opinion" prediction market supported by YZi Labs has already reached a weekly volume of $1.5 billion. This significant amount surpasses the performance of competitors Kalshi and Polymarket, emphasizing the growth and popularity of prediction markets in the industry.

data.title: Sherman Residential acquires 909 Flats, a 232-unit luxury apartment community in Nashville's Germantown neighborhood.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on December 4, 2025, Sherman Residential announced their recent acquisition of 909 Flats, a top-tier multifamily property. 909 Flats consists of 232 luxury apartments and is located in Germantown, an esteemed neighborhood in Nashville.

data.title: OECD-Cisco study shows emerging economies like India, Brazil, Mexico, and South Africa lead in AI adoption among younger adults.
data.description: Developing countries such as India, Brazil, Mexico, and South Africa are at the forefront of embracing generative AI technology on a global scale. Among these nations, the highest adoption rates, trust levels, and engagement with generative AI are observed among younger adults. There are notable disparities in usage based on age and location, with individuals under the age of 35 significantly more inclined to embrace this technology compared to older demographics.

data.title: Bank of Montreal appoints Tammy Brown to its Board of Directors. Brown brings expertise in audit. George Cope, Chair of Board, welcomes her.
data.description: In Toronto on December 4, 2025, Bank of Montreal revealed the addition of Tammy Brown to its Board of Directors. The announcement, made by George Cope, Board Chair, expressed the organization's satisfaction with the appointment of Brown. This move comes as the company trades on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: BMO) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: BMO). Brown's appointment brings her valuable audit experience to the board, enhancing its breadth of knowledge.

data.title: BMO Financial Group releases Q4 and FY 2025 results. Audited statements and MD&A available online.
data.description: The audited annual consolidated financial statements and Management Discussion and Analysis (MD&A) for BMO's fourth quarter of 2025 can be accessed online at www.bmo.com/investorrelations and www.sedarplus.ca. Key financial highlights for the fourth quarter of 2025 include...

data.title: BRP's Q3 results for FY 2026: Revenues of $2,250.3M (up 14.0%), Net income of $76.5M (up 150.0%).
data.description: Reporting revenues of $2,250.3 million, a 14.0% rise from the previous year, attributed to increased ORV deliveries and improved product mix post the successful introduction of new products. Net income reached $76.5 million, marking a significant 150.0% increase from the previous year.

data.title: White Castle offers unique White Elephant gifts at House of Crave online store. Free shipping on Dec. 10. Ohio. Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: White Castle, based in Columbus, Ohio, will offer a range of quirky items for holiday gifting this year. These surprising finds, such as cozy Crocs and a collectible dragon, promise laughs and quick customer uptake. The products are set to be available for purchase with free shipping on December 10, 2025.

data.title: Partners establish CO₂ logistics hub at Stockholm Norvik Port to transport carbon dioxide from industrial emitters in eastern Sweden.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway on December 4, 2025, it was announced that Höegh Evi and Aker BP, in partnership with Ports of Stockholm, have joined forces to create a CO₂ logistics hub. This initiative aims to establish a streamlined and eco-friendly transport system for carbon dioxide originating from industrial sources in eastern Sweden. Through this collaboration, the organizations seek to enhance efficiency and sustainability in handling CO₂ emissions, paving the way for a more environmentally conscious approach to industrial transportation.

data.title: CIBC reports $7.58 billion in revenue and $2.18 billion in net income for Q4/25, up 14% and 16% YoY respectively. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: CIBC's 2025 annual consolidated financial statements and MD&A are now available online, showcasing record financial performance. The fourth quarter highlights include revenue of $7.576 billion, reported net income of $2.180 billion, adjusted net income of $2.188 billion, and adjusted pre-provision, pre-tax earnings of $3.408 billion. For the full year, CIBC reported net income of $8.5 billion and adjusted net income of $8.5 billion, compared to $7.2 billion and $7.3 billion in 2024, respectively. The bank also announced an increase in its quarterly common share dividend from $0.97 to $1.07. The balance sheet shows total assets of $1.117 trillion. Furthermore, CIBC has made significant community contributions, such as donating $100,000 for hurricane relief and participating in charitable events like the Canadian Cancer Society Run for the Cure. An in-depth breakdown of performance numbers across different business segments and key financial metrics is presented.

data.title: WhiteBIT's native coin WBT added to S&P Cryptocurrency Broad Digital Market Index, enhancing visibility in Europe.
data.description: In Vilnius, Lithuania, on December 4, 2025, the WhiteBIT coin was added to the S&P Cryptocurrency Broad Digital Market (BDM) Index. This inclusion is a key achievement for WhiteBIT and the fintech sector in Central and Eastern Europe. The S&P BDM Index now incorporates WhiteBIT coin, underscoring its importance in the market. This milestone signifies a notable development in the cryptocurrency space, with WhiteBIT making strides by being part of an index that tracks digital assets.

data.title: Bitcoin ATM operator in Seattle told to return over $8M to customers in WA crackdown for claiming unredeemed vouchers as income.
data.description: A Bitcoin ATM operator headquartered in Seattle is at risk of having its license revoked for reportedly treating unredeemed customer vouchers as income.
VOLKSWAGEN EXPECTED TO SECURE DEAL WITH EU COMMISSION TO REPLACE EU ANTI-SUBSIDY DUTIES ON CHINA-MADE EVS WITH A MINIMUM IMPORT PRICE SYSTEM – CAPITOL FORUM

data.title: New Grayscale Chainlink ETF accrues $41M on launch but falls short of expectations, unable to offset LINK token's 39% drop.
data.description: The launch of the Chainlink ETF was described as successful by analysts, but it has not generated sufficient liquidity to offset the LINK token's 39% decrease in the last year.

data.title: UPM & Sappi sign non-binding intent to form graphic paper JV. Dec 4, 2025. Helsinki. (100 chars)
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Helsinki, UPM-Kymmene Corporation announced the signing of a non-binding letter of intent with Sappi Limited to establish a graphic paper joint venture. This partnership aims to strengthen their presence in the market and enhance their competitiveness. The agreement is a significant move towards collaboration and strategic growth for both companies. The specific details and financial implications of the joint venture were not disclosed in the release.

data.title: Projected AAVE breakout to $195-$205 in 7 days due to bullish MACD and RSI recovery.
data.description: Experts are forecasting that AAVE's price will experience a significant increase in the near future, potentially reaching between $195 and $205 within the next week. This prediction is backed by a bullish MACD momentum and a rebound in the Relative Strength Index (RSI) from previously oversold levels.
JPMORGAN CUTS LENNAR TO ‘UNDERWEIGHT’ FROM ‘NEUTRAL’; CUTS PRICE TARGET TO $115 FROM $118

data.title: Shentel launches fiber-to-the-home internet in Radford, VA, offering symmetrical, multi-gig speeds starting Dec 2025.
data.description: Edinburg, VA, December 4, 2025 - Shenandoah Telecommunications Company (Shentel) (Nasdaq: SHEN), a top broadband services provider, has revealed the introduction of its new 100% fiber-to-the-home internet service in Radford, Virginia. The Shentel Fiber service offers symmetrical, multi-gig internet speeds to residential and commercial customers beginning in December 2025. The construction for this service is set to be finished by March 2026.
